summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of employee evaluation system. All core features working correctly including dynamic sliders, matrix updates, navigation, and interactive elements.
passed_tests: Main 'Ingreso de Resultados' view loads correctly with employee selection
KPI and 360 sliders function properly and update values in real-time
9-box matrix classification updates dynamically based on slider values
Manual override toggle works and displays all 9 classification options
Navigation between all 6 views works seamlessly
Employee Profile view displays correctly with banner and avatar
360 Evaluation view has functional questionnaire with 1-5 rating buttons
KPI Evaluation view shows KPIs with working sliders and progress bars
Self Evaluation view has working rating buttons and override toggle
9-Box Matrix view displays clickable 3x3 grid with detailed information
All interactive elements respond correctly to user input
Visual design is consistent and professional across all views
Color coding system works properly (green=A, yellow=B1-B4, orange/red=C1-C4)
Mock data displays correctly throughout the application
